name: gh

installs.notes: Available in Ubuntu 23.04+/Debian 12+ default repos. Older releases need GitHub's own apt repo (keyring + sources.list entry) first — walk the user through those steps individually rather than a combined one-liner.

commonFailures: Installed fine but `gh auth login` was never run — most 'gh is broken' reports are actually missing auth.
On older Ubuntu, `apt-get install gh` finds nothing because the package only exists in GitHub's third-party repo.
